memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::SplineBuilder = typename SplineInterpolatorType::BuilderType
memberdef.name: SplineBuilder

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::SplineEvaluator = typename SplineInterpolatorType::EvaluatorType
memberdef.name: SplineEvaluator

memberdef.type: IPoissonSolver< typename SplineEvaluator::evaluation_domain_type, IdxRangeBatched, double, typename SplineEvaluator::memory_space, Kokkos::layout_right >
memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::base_type = IPoissonSolver< typename SplineEvaluator::evaluation_domain_type, IdxRangeBatched, double, typename SplineEvaluator::memory_space, Kokkos::layout_right>
memberdef.name: base_type

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::InputBSplines = typename SplineBuilder::bsplines_type
memberdef.name: InputBSplines

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::PDEDim = typename GridPDEDim::continuous_dimension_type
memberdef.name: PDEDim

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::field_type = typename base_type::field_type
memberdef.name: field_type

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::vector_field_type = typename base_type::vector_field_type
memberdef.name: vector_field_type

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::fem_idx_range_type = typename base_type::laplacian_idx_range_type
memberdef.name: fem_idx_range_type

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::batch_idx_range_type = typename base_type::batch_idx_range_type
memberdef.name: batch_idx_range_type

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::batch_index_type = typename base_type::batch_index_type
memberdef.name: batch_index_type

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::memory_space = typename base_type::memory_space
memberdef.name: memory_space

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::exec_space = typename SplineEvaluator::exec_space
memberdef.name: exec_space

briefdescription.para: An index of the grid of quadrature points.
A displacement on the grid of quadrature points.
The index range of the grid of quadrature points.

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::DQFieldMem = DFieldMem<IdxRangeQ, memory_space>
memberdef.name: DQFieldMem

briefdescription.para: An array of values defined at the quadrature points.

parameterdescription.para: The type of the elements in the chunk.

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::DQConstField = DConstField<IdxRangeQ, memory_space>
memberdef.name: DQConstField

briefdescription.para: The accessor type for the DQFieldMem type.

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::CoordQField = Field<CoordPDEDim, IdxRangeQ, memory_space>
memberdef.name: CoordQField

briefdescription.para: An array of coordinates defined at the quadrature points.

parameterdescription.para: The type of the elements in the chunk.

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::FEMBSplines = std::conditional_t< ddc::is_uniform_bsplines_v<InputBSplines> && !InputBSplines::is_periodic(), HiddenFEMBSplines, InputBSplines>
memberdef.name: FEMBSplines

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::FEMEvalExtrapolationRule = std::conditional_t< FEMBSplines::is_periodic(), ddc::PeriodicExtrapolationRule<PDEDim>, ddc::NullExtrapolationRule>
memberdef.name: FEMEvalExtrapolationRule

memberdef.type: ddc::SplineEvaluator< Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace::memory_space, FEMBSplines, GridPDEDim, FEMEvalExtrapolationRule, FEMEvalExtrapolationRule >
memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::FEMSplineEvaluator = ddc::SplineEvaluator< Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace, Kokkos::DefaultExecutionSpace::memory_space, FEMBSplines, GridPDEDim, FEMEvalExtrapolationRule, FEMEvalExtrapolationRule>
memberdef.name: FEMSplineEvaluator

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::IdxRangeBatchedFEMBSplines = typename FEMSplineEvaluator::template batched_spline_domain_type<IdxRangeBatched>
memberdef.name: IdxRangeBatchedFEMBSplines

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::FEMBSplinesCoeffMem = DFieldMem<IdxRangeFEMBSplines, memory_space>
memberdef.name: FEMBSplinesCoeffMem

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::BatchedFEMBSplinesCoeffMem = DFieldMem<IdxRangeBatchedFEMBSplines, memory_space>
memberdef.name: BatchedFEMBSplinesCoeffMem

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::BatchedFEMBSplinesCoeff = typename BatchedFEMBSplinesCoeffMem::span_type
memberdef.name: BatchedFEMBSplinesCoeff

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::IdxRangeBatchedBSplines = typename SplineEvaluator::template batched_spline_domain_type<IdxRangeBatched>
memberdef.name: IdxRangeBatchedBSplines

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::full_index = typename IdxRangeBatched::discrete_element_type
memberdef.name: full_index

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::CoordFieldMem = FieldMem<CoordPDEDim, IdxRangeBatched, memory_space>
memberdef.name: CoordFieldMem

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::CoordField = Field<CoordPDEDim, IdxRangeBatched, memory_space>
memberdef.name: CoordField

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::RHSSplineCoeffMem = DFieldMem<IdxRangeBatchedBSplines, memory_space>
memberdef.name: RHSSplineCoeffMem

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::RHSSplineCoeff = typename RHSSplineCoeffMem::span_type
memberdef.name: RHSSplineCoeff

memberdef.definition: using FEM1DPoissonSolver< SplineInterpolatorType, IdxRangeBatched >::RHSQuadTags = ddc:: type_seq_merge_t<typename base_type::batch_tags, ddc::detail::TypeSeq<GridPDEDimQ> >
memberdef.name: RHSQuadTags

parameterdescription.para: A spline interpolator containing the builder which calculates the coefficients of a spline representation and the associated evaluator which provides the value of the spline representation from its coefficients.
A spline builder which calculates the coefficients of a spline representation.
A spline evaluator which provides the value of a spline representation from its coefficients.

briefdescription.para: An operator which calculates the solution $\phi$ to Poisson's equation: $ -\Delta \phi = \rho $.

parameterdescription.para: The right-hand side of Poisson's equation.

simplesect.para: A reference to the solution to Poisson's equation.

memberdef.argsstring: (field_type phi, vector_field_type E, field_type rho) const override
memberdef.name: operator()

briefdescription.para: An operator which calculates the solution $\phi$ to Poisson's equation and its derivative: $ - \Delta \phi = \rho $ $ E = - \nabla \phi $.

parameterdescription.para: The negative derivative of the solution to Poisson's equation.
The right-hand side of Poisson's equation.

simplesect.para: A reference to the solution to Poisson's equation.

parameterdescription.para: The spline coefficients which will describe the result on the FEM basis.
The function on the right hand side of the equation at the interpolation points.

detaileddescription.para: A class to solve the following equation: $ -\Delta \phi = \rho $ using a Finite Element Method.

parameterdescription.para: An operator which builds spline coefficients.
An evaluator which can be used to evaluate splines.
The type af the index range over which this operator will operate. By default: the 1D index range of the interpolation points for the spline builder.

node.label: IPoissonSolver< IdxRangeLaplacian, IdxRangeFull, DataType, MemorySpace, LayoutSpace >
IPoissonSolver< IdxRangeLaplacian, IdxRangeFull, DataType, MemorySpace, LayoutSpace >
